titleZh: 试读新公司法中的双重股东代表诉讼制度
titleEn: On the PRC New Company Law’s Dual-Shareholder Representative Litigation System
abstractZh: 围绕双层代表诉讼制度、起诉资格和争议焦点进行梳理，帮助判断公司与股东行权路径。
abstractEn: Explains representative litigation mechanisms under the new law and practical prerequisites for shareholder enforcement.
